title: Hour timeline
excerpt: hello, is there possible in Monday CRM to make hour timeline? i need to set date and hour for my employees and also display that information in calendar view. if you had any similar experience before please share with me…

posts.author: lizi (lizi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello, is there possible in Monday CRM to make hour timeline? i need to set date and hour for my employees and also display that information in calendar view. if you had any similar experience before please share with me.
thank you so much in advance

posts.author: Avo_FluidApps (Avo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @lizi - you might find our new Smart Timeline + Duration app really helpful for managing dates, statuses, reminders, and assignments. It extends the native Timeline and Duration columns in ways that aren’t possible out of the box, all powered through automation, making your workflows way more dynamic and efficient.

Feel free to give it a look, and I’d love to hear your feedback or even walk you through it live if that helps!

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi lizi,

If you’re open to marketplace apps, we’ve created a calendar solution just for this. It works with a start Date column and an end Date column, and displays this in a calendar view. Its basic features are free, so have a go

–
